turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I've been having trouble sleeping lately. I try to follow all the advice, like keeping a regular bedtime and avoiding screens before bed, but nothing seems to work.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That sounds really tough. Have you tried any relaxation techniques? Some people find that deep breathing or meditation helps calm their minds.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I've heard about those, but I never seem to be able to relax enough to fall asleep. It's like my mind just won't shut off.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It can feel really frustrating. You might want to try a different approach, such as progressive muscle relaxation or listening to soothing music before bed.
